questions.prompt: “Cheesecake” is my favorite ____ on the dessert menu.
questions.explain: 菜單上的一道品項要用 item。

questions.prompt: He was made ____ outside for thirty minutes.
questions.explain: 主動是 make sb. wait，但被動時要補回 to，變成 be made to wait。

questions.prompt: We need to deal ____ this problem before it gets worse.
questions.explain: deal with 表示「處理、應付」。

questions.prompt: Our classroom looks much better now because everyone helped keep it ____.
questions.explain: 教室變整齊了，所以選 tidy。

choices: Jack doesn’t eat spicy food, and I don’t, either.
Jack doesn’t eat spicy food, and I either don’t.
Jack doesn’t eat spicy food, and either I don’t.
Jack doesn’t eat spicy food, and neither I do.
questions.explain: 否定句句尾附和最自然是 I don’t, either。若用 neither，應寫成 neither do I。

questions.prompt: Without my glasses, my ____ becomes poor and I can’t read the words on the board.
questions.explain: 看不清楚黑板字，表示「視力」不好，所以選 sight。

choices: While the bus arrived, we were waiting.
When the bus arrived, we were waiting.
While the bus was arrived, we waited.
When the bus arriving, we were waiting.
questions.explain: bus arrived 是短動作，所以應用 when。

choices: This is the restaurant which my family had dinner last Sunday.
This is the restaurant where my family had dinner last Sunday.
This is the restaurant whose my family had dinner last Sunday.
This is the restaurant who my family had dinner last Sunday.
questions.explain: 後面 my family had dinner last Sunday 這個子句本身已經完整，缺的是「在那家餐廳」的地點概念，所以要用 where。若用 which，必須改成 which my family had dinner in last Sunday，或更正式地寫成 in which my family had dinner last Sunday。

questions.prompt: A: Let’s meet at the library at 3:00. B: It’s a ____.
questions.explain: It’s a deal. = 一言為定。

choices: I know the woman who daughter studies in Japan.
I know the woman whose daughter studies in Japan.
I know the woman where daughter studies in Japan.
I know the woman which daughter studies in Japan.
questions.explain: daughter 前面需要所有格，所以要用 whose。
